info.title: ApplicationInspector.CLI
info.description:
© Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.
analyze        Inspect source directory/file/compressed file (.tgz|zip)
against defined characteristics
tagdiff        Compares unique tag values between two source paths
exporttags     Export the list of tags associated with the specified rules.
Does not scan source code.
verifyrules    Verify custom rules syntax is valid
packrules      Combine multiple rule files into one file for ease in
distribution
help           Display more information on a specific command.
version        Display version information.

commands.name: analyze
commands.description:
Inspect source directory/file/compressed file (.tgz|zip)
against defined characteristics

options.name: --source-path
options.description:
Required. Source file or directory to
inspect, comma separated

options.name: --output-file-format
options.description:
(Default: html) Output format
[html|json|text]

options.name: --text-format
options.description:
(Default:
Tag:%T,Rule:%N,Ruleid:%R,Confidence:%X
,File:%F,Sourcetype:%t,Line:%L,Sample:
%m) Match text format specifiers

options.name: --no-show-progress
options.description: Disable progress information.

options.name: --context-lines
options.description:
Number of lines of context on each
side to include in excerpt (up to a
maximum of 100 * NumLines characters
on each side). 0 to skip exerpt. -1 to
not extract samples or excerpts
(implied by -t). When outputting sarif
use -1 for no snippets, all other
values ignored.

options.name: --tags-only
options.description:
Only get tags (no detailed match
data). Ignored if output format is
sarif.

options.name: --no-file-metadata
options.description:
Don't collect metadata about each
individual file.

options.name: --allow-all-tags-in-build-files
options.description:
Allow all tags (not just Metadata
tags) in files of type Build.

options.name: --max-num-matches-per-tag
options.description:
If non-zero, and TagsOnly is not set,
will ignore rules based on if all of
their tags have been found the set
value number of times.

options.name: --base-path
options.description:
If set, when outputting sarif, will
have paths made relative to the
provided path.

options.name: --repository-uri
options.description:
If set, override any automatically
detected RepositoryUri in Sarif
report.

options.name: --commit-hash
options.description:
If set, override any automatically
detected CommitHash in Sarif report.

options.name: --disable-custom-rule-validation
options.description:
By default when providing custom rules
they are validated. When set,
validation will be skipped.

options.name: --ignore-default-rules
options.description:
(Default: false) Exclude default rules
bundled with application

options.name: --file-timeout
options.description:
(Default: 60000) Maximum amount of
time in milliseconds to allow for
processing each file. 0 is infinity.
Default: 60000.

options.name: --processing-timeout
options.description:
(Default: 0) Maximum amount of time in
milliseconds to allow for processing.
When NoShowProgress is set this
includes enumeration time. 0 is
infinity. Default: 0.

options.name: --enumeration-timeout
options.description:
(Default: 0) Maximum amount of time in
milliseconds to allow for enumerating.
0 is infinity. Default: 0.

options.name: --disable-archive-crawling
options.description: Disable Archive Enumeration.

options.name: --single-threaded
options.description:
Disables parallel processing. May be
helpful for debugging with higher
verbosity.

options.name: --exclusion-globs
options.description:
(Default: **/bin/** **/obj/**
**/.vs/** **/.git/**) Exclude source
files that match glob patterns.
Example: "**/.git/**,*Tests*".  Use
"none" to disable.

options.name: --scan-unknown-filetypes
options.description: Scan files of unknown types.

options.name: --confidence-filters
options.description:
(Default: High Medium) Output only
matches with specified confidence
<value>,<value>. Default: Medium,High.
[High|Medium|Low]

options.name: --severity-filters
options.description:
(Default: Critical Important Moderate
BestPractice ManualReview) Output only
matches with specified severity
<value>,<value>. Default: All are
enabled.
[Critical|Important|Moderate|BestPract
ice|ManualReview]

options.name: --custom-rules-path
options.description: Custom rules file or directory path

options.name: --custom-languages-path
options.description:
Replace the default languages set with
a custom languages.json.

options.name: --custom-comments-path
options.description:
Replace the default comment
specification set with a custom
comments.json.

options.name: --disable-require-unique-ids
options.description: Allow rules with duplicate IDs.

options.name: --success-error-code-with-no-matches
options.description:
When processing is apparently
successful but there are no matches
return a success error code - useful
for CI.

options.name: --require-must-match
options.description:
When validating, require rules to have
MustMatch self-tests.

options.name: --require-must-not-match
options.description:
When validating, require rules to have
MustNotMatch self-tests.

options.name: --non-backtracking-regex
options.description:
(Default: false) Prefer
non-backtracking regex for all rules
unless they require the backtracking
engine. A warning will be displayed
for all regular expressions that
require backtracking support. Default:
Off.

options.name: --output-file-path
options.description: Output file path

options.name: --console-verbosity
options.description:
(Default: Information) Console
verbosity
[Verbose|Debug|Information|Warning|Err
or|Fatal]

options.name: --disable-console
options.description:
(Default: false) Disable console
output of logging messages.

options.name: --log-file-level
options.description:
(Default: Error) Log file level
[Verbose|Debug|Information|Warning|Err
or|Fatal]

options.name: --log-file-path
options.description:
Log file path. If not set, will not
log to file.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: tagdiff
commands.description: Compares unique tag values between two source paths

options.name: --src1
options.description:
Required. Source 1 to compare (commaa
separated)

options.name: --src2
options.description:
Required. Source 2 to compare (commaa
separated)

options.name: --test-type
options.description:
(Default: Equality) Type of test to
run [Equality|Inequality]

options.name: --disable-custom-rule-validation
options.description:
By default when providing custom rules
they are validated. When set,
validation will be skipped.

options.name: --ignore-default-rules

milliseconds to allow for enumerating.
0 is infinity. Default: 0.
